description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape, featuring a traditional black and white pattern composed of pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with sharp, clean edges between the panels. The black pentagons and white hexagons are evenly distributed, creating a visually striking and iconic look. There are no visible logos, text, or branding on the surface, and the seams between the panels are subtle, suggesting a high-quality finish. The ball appears to be in pristine condition, with no visible scuffs, dirt, or deformation. Its size and design are typical for use in parks, playgrounds, or urban sports fields.
description: A pristine, classic black and white football with a smooth, glossy surface and traditional panel pattern. The ball is clean, well-constructed, and free of visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: This view shows a prominent black pentagonal panel near the center, surrounded by white hexagons and additional black panels partially visible at the edges.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a large white hexagonal area with two black pentagons on either side, giving a balanced look to the panel distribution.
description_view_2: This perspective centers on a black pentagon, with adjacent white hexagons and black panels forming a symmetrical pattern.
description_view_3: This view displays a black pentagon slightly off-center, bordered by white hexagons and a few black panels at the periphery.
